tree.name: LoadingRoot
tree.aggregateText: Entering Sunny Meadow Packing boosters, goals, and orchard surprises for your next run. UP NEXT Level 128 Collect honey drops and clear the jelly lane. Goal 24 / 18 ◡ Poppy is setting the meadow board. LOADING 74% Preloading stage goals, booster inventory, and combo popups. Level Preview Watch the honey lanes and save rockets for the lower right corner. TIP A rocket plus hammer combo is the safest answer when honey crates block the final drop lane.
